items.title: More big energy users to get help as support plan expanded
items.summary: A scheme to cut bills for firms that are heavy energy users is being extended to cover an additional 3,000 businesses.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Sudan Enters Fourth Year of War Amid World’s Most Severe Humanitarian Crisis
items.summary: Fighting that erupted in 2023 has forced millions from their homes and left widespread hunger that is now being compounded by strife in the Middle East.
